name: Li Peng Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Li Peng Enterprise Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells fabrics and yarns primarily in Asia. The company provides nylon chips, nylon filament yarns, nylon special functional yarns, and solution dyed yarns. It also offers various synthetic fabrics, such as fabrics for industrial purposes; flame retardant and blackout home textile fabrics; and fabrics for sportswear, fashion wear, and uniforms. In addition, it provides polymerization, spinning, and weaving services, as well as dyeing and post-finishing process. Li Peng Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1975 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
